subcodes.first_line: The grace of God hath no bound, and His bounties no end, extending unto His loved ones even after all ties are severed [3.5s]
subcodes.first_line_orig: فضل حق را کرانی نه و عنایتش را انتهائی نه از برای دوستان بعد از قطع اسباب قرب
subcodes.subjects: @business; financial; property matters, @divine grace, bounty, confirmations; spiritual capacity, @prayer for prosperity, @power and sovereignty of God; omnipotence of God, @suffering and imprisonment
